case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. AUTO WORLD COLLISION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK LOBRE--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.
